title: Allegro MicroSystems Q2 2024 Earnings Beat
text: Allegro MicroSystems delivered stronger-than-expected second quarter results. The semiconductor company reported earnings per share of $0.08, exceeding analyst expectations of $0.06 by 33%. This represents a significant decline from the $0.40 per share earned in the same quarter last year. The company generated $187.39 million in quarterly revenue, marginally surpassing consensus estimates. However, this figure declined substantially from $275.51 million in the year-ago period, reflecting challenging market conditions in the semiconductor sector. Year-to-date, ALGM shares have declined approximately 26.6%, underperforming the S&P 500's 21.9% gain. The company is rated as a Hold with a Zacks Rank #3, suggesting near-term performance aligned with broader market trends. Analysts project the company will earn $0.10 per share next quarter on revenues of $206.9 million. For the full fiscal year, consensus estimates stand at $0.37 earnings per share against $789 million in total revenue. The semiconductor industry itself remains challenged, currently ranking in the bottom 43% of Zacks industries.
